final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing character illustration for a Chinese fantasy game, featuring a Hanfu-clad woman playing guqin in a bamboo forest.

Style/medium: digital game character illustration, ethereal Chinese fantasy art style, painterly brushwork with clean linework
Composition: medium shot, three-quarter view, subject centered, flowing vertical composition
Subject: elegant Hanfu-clad woman with long flowing hair, delicate facial features, traditional guqin in hands, sleeves and ribbons billowing in wind
Scene/backdrop: dense bamboo forest at night, tall bamboo stalks framing the subject, moonlit atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft moonlight filtering through bamboo leaves, dappled light and shadow on ground and figure, mysterious and ethereal mood
Color palette: cool moonlit blues and silvers as base, warm cream and pale jade for Hanfu fabric, deep emerald for bamboo
Materials/textures: flowing silk fabric with subtle sheen, smooth bamboo surfaces, soft hair strands, polished guqin wood
Avoid: modern clothing elements, harsh artificial lighting, cluttered composition, generic anime style, 8K stuffer aesthetic
